channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Next-gen Xbox console, codenamed Project Helix, will play PC games - GamesIndustry.biz

  5. Upcoming 'Project Helix' Xbox Will "Play Xbox and PC Games," But PC VR Support is Unconfirmed  Road to VR

  4. OLED M6 MacBook Pro With Touchscreen Support Won’t Offer A macOS & iPadOS Hybrid Software Experience, As Apple Is Going For A Conservative Approach  Wccftech
  5. New Macs This Spring? Don’t Buy One for These Reasons  nextpit.com

item.title: Review: Tales Of Berseria Remastered (Switch) - QoL Tweaks Make A Brilliant Game Even Better - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Review: Tales Of Berseria Remastered (Switch) - QoL Tweaks Make A Brilliant Game Even Better  Nintendo Life
  2. PS3 and PS4 Exclusive RPG Gets New Remaster 10 Years Later  ComicBook.com
  3. Tales of Berseria Remastered - Day 1 Patch  Bandai Namco Europe
  4. Tales of Bersaria Remastered Shares New Japanese Commercial  GoNintendo
  5. Is the Remastered Switch Experience Worth It?  wadenanews.ca

item.title: The final straw? Star Citizen fans erupt over delayed data breach reveal. - Windows Central
item.description:
1. The final straw? Star Citizen fans erupt over delayed data breach reveal.  Windows Central
  2. Brit games studio Cloud Imperium admits to data breach  theregister.com
  3. Star Citizen developer CIG admits that a hacker gained access to account data… six week ago  Massively Overpowered
  4. Data of fans of the "most expensive game" leaked - a month and a half later, the authors of Star Citizen acknowledged the problem  IXBT.games
  5. "Star Citizen": Attackers had access to data from Cloud Imperium Games  heise online
